primary_operations.name: Handle
primary_operations.sdk_call: conn, err := h.upgrader.Upgrade(w, r, nil); if err != nil { return }; defer conn.Close(); for { mt, msg, err := conn.ReadMessage(); if err != nil { return }; if err := conn.WriteMessage(mt, msg); err != nil { return } }

code_style_notes: Set CheckOrigin on Upgrader to allow cross-origin upgrades; default rejects them
Always defer conn.Close() — leaked connections accumulate file descriptors
